display.purpose: Major terminal readouts, login hero, and rare instrument-panel values.

headline.purpose: Large page or modal emphasis without losing product density.

title.purpose: Page titles, modal titles, and major panel names.

caption.purpose: Table cells, metadata, compact values, and inputs.

label.purpose: Navigation, buttons, headers, form labels, and bracket commands.

motion.name: crt-flicker
motion.purpose: Subtle monitor presence on the app shell.

motion.name: terminal-boot
motion.purpose: Stepped entry for data surfaces, panels, and toasts.

narrative.overview: projmgmt is a self-hosted production console, not a generic SaaS surface. The visual system should feel like a terminal instrument panel used by a small video team while deadlines, shotlists, sponsor deals, drafts, analytics, and storage paths are moving at once. It is sharp, compact, high-contrast, and deliberate.
keyCharacteristics: Dense operational surfaces with clear hierarchy and compact labels.
Sharp rectangular panels, visible borders, and semantic color tokens.
Mono-heavy labels, IDs, metrics, tags, and table data.
Mechanical stepped motion used only for state, load, or terminal presence.
Dark and light modes powered by the same semantic slots.

rules.name: The Token Gate Rule
rules.body: Components must consume semantic Tailwind tokens from src/app/globals.css, not hardcoded hex values or raw Tailwind palette classes.

rules.name: The Meaning Only Rule
rules.body: Accent and status colors are applied to values, controls, and state indicators. They are forbidden as decoration.

rules.name: The Light Parity Rule
rules.body: Every component must work through the same semantic slots in dark and light mode. If a class works only because the app is dark, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Command Voice Rule
rules.body: Functional copy is short, uppercase, and specific. Bracketed commands such as [ APPROVE ] and [ SCAN FOR DRAFT 2 ] are part of the system language.

rules.name: The No Display Labels Rule
rules.body: Doto never appears in buttons, form labels, table data, or navigation. Data-dense UI uses mono and Space Grotesk.

rules.name: The Flat Instrument Rule
rules.body: Panels, tables, modals, dropdowns, cards, and columns stay sharp and flat. Use ui-panel, ui-panel-raised, borders, and tokenized surfaces instead of shadows.

rules.name: The Border Is Structure Rule
rules.body: Borders describe containment, table rhythm, and active state. Do not use side-stripe borders as decorative accents.

rules.name: The Inversion Rule
rules.body: Hover and active states invert or tighten contrast instantly. They do not lift, scale, blur, or bounce.

dos: Do use semantic Tailwind tokens from src/app/globals.css for all colors, borders, text, and surfaces.
Do preserve the terminal aesthetic over generic SaaS polish.
Do keep labels compact, uppercase, mono-heavy, and directly tied to action or data.
Do use existing primitives and utilities: Button, Input, Picker, Checkbox, Tag, StatusDot, Toast, controlStyles, .ui-panel, .ui-button-*, .ui-table-*, .ui-tag-muted, and .ui-bar-*.
Do keep page containers for tables and lists at h-full w-full overflow-auto p-lg.
Do compute localized dates and sponsorship currency displays through the existing helper APIs.
Do keep motion mechanical, stepped, short, and state-driven.
Do verify UI changes in the browser when feasible, especially Kanban interactions, modal state sync, and responsive table/list layouts.
donts: Don't use corporate cards, soft shadows, decorative gradients, glassmorphism, bouncy motion, or rounded default UI.
Don't use raw Tailwind palette colors such as red-500, green-400, emerald-500, or zinc-* in components.
Don't hardcode color hex values in components. Document tokens here, but consume tokens in code.
Don't use smooth easing, spring physics, scale hovers, animated layout properties, or decorative page choreography.
Don't add side-stripe borders, gradient text, glassmorphism, the hero-metric template, identical card grids, or modal-first flows.
Don't introduce p-8 page shells, rounded cards, nested cards, decorative floating sections, or shadow-based hierarchy.
Don't duplicate workflow strings, stage logic, platform names, role names, currency lists, or content-type values outside their shared constants and helpers.
Don't replace the terminal UI with standard web defaults while fixing small bugs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: High-contrast command button for primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-text-display); color: var(--color-text-inverse); border: 1px solid var(--color-text-display); border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 24px; font-family: var(--font-label); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { background: var(--color-background); color: var(--color-text-display); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary command button for actions that should stay visible but quiet.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-visible); border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-label); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-btn-outline:hover, .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { background: var(--color-text-display); color: var(--color-text-inverse); border-color: var(--color-text-display); outline: none; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive command button that keeps red semantic and restrained.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: transparent; color: var(--color-accent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent) 45%, transparent); border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 16px; font-family: var(--font-label); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-btn-danger:hover, .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { background: var(--color-accent-subtle); outline: none; }

components.name: Underline Input
components.description: Minimal form field used in auth, settings, and compact edit flows.
components.html: <label class="ds-input-label" for="ds-title">TITLE</label><input id="ds-title" class="ds-input" placeholder="Project title" />
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-family: var(--font-label); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-display); border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-visible); padding: 4px 0; font-family: var(--font-caption); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-disabled); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--color-text-display); outline: none; }

components.name: Native Picker
components.description: Native select control with extracted field styling and the shared terminal chevron.
components.css: .ds-picker-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-family: var(--font-label); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-picker-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-picker { width: 100%; appearance: none; cursor: pointer; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-display); border: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-visible); padding: 4px 24px 8px 0; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color-scheme: dark; } .ds-picker:focus { border-color: var(--color-text-display); outline: none; } .ds-picker:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-picker-icon { pointer-events: none; position: absolute; right: 0; bottom: 8px; width: 12px; height: 12px; color: var(--color-text-secondary); }

components.name: Terminal Panel
components.description: Flat bordered surface for cards, modals, dropdowns, and repeated dashboard panels.
components.html:
PIPELINE

EDITING QUEUE

4 ACTIVE PROJECTS
components.css: .ds-panel { background: var(--color-surface); color: var(--color-text-primary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-visible); border-radius: 0; padding: 24px; } .ds-panel-kicker { margin: 0 0 8px; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-family: var(--font-label); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-display); font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; } .ds-panel-meta { margin: 12px 0 0; color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-family: var(--font-caption); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Terminal Tag
components.description: Tiny uppercase metadata chip for platform, format, and state facts.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-secondary); border: 1px solid var(--color-border-visible); border-radius: 0; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: var(--font-caption); font-size: 9px; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Dense row vocabulary for Archive, Sponsorships, Team, and Analytics lists.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; color: var(--color-text-primary); font-family: var(--font-caption); font-size: 14px; } .ds-table tr { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); } .ds-table tr:hover { background: var(--color-hover-surface); } .ds-table td { padding: 16px; } .ds-muted { color: var(--color-text-secondary); font-size: 12px; } .ds-right { text-align: right; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Sharp mono navigation item with instant inversion.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; color: var(--color-text-disabled); border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 8px 12px; text-decoration: none; font-family: var(--font-label); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-nav-icon { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-item:hover, .ds-nav-item:focus-visible, .ds-nav-item[aria-current='page'] { color: var(--color-text-display); background: var(--color-surface-raised); border-color: var(--color-border-visible); outline: none; }

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Flat segmented progress used for production and analytics readouts.
components.css: .ds-bar { height: 4px; width: 100%; background: var(--color-surface-raised); border-radius: 0; overflow: hidden; } .ds-bar span { display: block; height: 100%; background: var(--color-text-display); }
